_README: R1 Config — Robocon 2026. ALL logic on RPi. Arduino flash-once. Edit + restart = instant changes.

ps4._button_map: B0=X/Cross, B1=Circle, B2=Triangle, B3=Square, B4=L1, B5=R1, B6=L2, B7=R2, B8=Share, B9=Options, B10=PS, B11=L3, B12=R3
ps4._servo_a: Square (B3) = move both servos to pos_a
ps4._servo_b: Cross/X (B0) = move both servos to pos_b

extra_motors._help: M5 and M6 driven by right-joystick Y-axis (up/down). Position sync algorithm matches their RPM automatically without needing motor specs.
extra_motors._wiring: M5: PWM=9 DIR=42 EncA=18 EncB=24 | M6: PWM=8 DIR=43 EncA=21 EncB=27
extra_motors._inv_m5: Flip M5 direction relative to joystick
extra_motors._inv_m6: Flip M6 direction relative to joystick
extra_motors._sync: Multiplier to fix speed difference (Range: 0.5 to 5.0). Higher = forces tighter match.

servos._help: Run servo_test.py to find correct position values, then update here.

servo1._speed: Degrees per 20ms step — lower = slower sweep

servo2._speed: Degrees per 20ms step — lower = slower sweep
